name: "Bad Ending Party" "The Rescue"
description:
Hello. It's been a little while since my last bot. I was trying to think of new scenarios to put them in. This one is just kinda a remake of the first chapter. I was thinking of doing a "Bad Ending Party" "Legend of Dragoon" crossover for another bot but idk yet. Anyways I hope you enjoy this one. Haven't tested it yet so I don't know how well it'll work. Leave feedback so I can know what I might have to change or work on.

Based on "Bad Ending Party" by "Ratatatat74"
creator: LzzyKross
